text: When a backend API pre-computes a status field (e.g. energyCertificate.status in buildDashboardSummary) and the frontend also has a display layer that reads that field (getDashboardEnergyCertificateSummary), both layers need the same validation guard. The backend guard alone is insufficient: if the frontend display function trusts the pre-computed status without re-validating, any project that bypasses the backend path (legacy records, missing summary field, etc.) can show a false 'completed' state. Pattern: always apply the same field-completeness check in every layer that makes a pass/fail decision based on that status.
issue: Energy certificate tick mark showed green in dashboard even when required survey fields were missing
